title: Poetry Canada Poesie
content:
...wry humour.
    The poet revels in image and can use it well.
    Paul Cameron Brown is capable of interesting,
    even arresting work.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Poetry Canada Poesie"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
